name: Lemon Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: Yellow cake mix with pudding (1 package)
Lemon curd (11 1/4 oz Jar, about 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 10-inch Bundt pan or tube pan.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to the label instructions, but add lemon curd and use 1/4 cup less water than recommended.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts; pour the batter evenly into the pan.
5. Bake the cake for 45 to 50 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for 25 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
7. Grate the peel from the lemon and squeeze the juice into a small bowl.
8. In a small bowl, mix the confectioners sugar with 4-1/2 teaspoons of lemon juice until smooth and of an easy spreading consistency, adding more lemon juice if necessary.
9. Spoon the glaze over the cake and garnish with grated lemon peel.
Each serving contains about 315 calories, 15 grams fat, 83 mg cholesterol, and 230 mg sodium.
